LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MARINA KHATTAK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT MARINA KHATTAK'S DEMURRERS ARE OVERRULED. THE COMPLAINT ADEQUATELY PLEADS OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT AND ACCOUNT STATED. (CALIFORNIA CIVIL JURY INSTRUCTIONS 372, 373.) THE CODE SECTIONS DEFENDANT'S DEMURRERS CITE DO NOT APPLY. ORDER IS SIGNED.JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jason Tang, Esq. 888-788-8355 of Suttell & Hammer for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. Plaintiff submits to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MARINA KHATTAK'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant Marina Khattak's demurrers are overruled. The complaint adequately pleads open book account and account stated. (California Civil Jury Instructions 372, 373.) The code sections defendant's demurrers cite do not apply.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
